# Gyeon Primer - 120 ml

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Primer-120-ml_1476_1_m_2431.jpg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Primer-120-ml_1476_1_lw_2431.jpg)

### Available Sizes

*

120 ml

$15.99

### Product Information

- Remove light imperfections, while prepping your paint for coating application

- Leaves behind an incredible layer of gloss

- SiO2 primer leaves the surface clean and ready for a coating layer

- Product Code: GY-3088

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

50% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 2 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

Gyeon Q2 Primer is an ultra-light finishing polish that will help you remove light imperfections, while prepping your paint for coating application! When applying a coating, you will have to wipe the paint down with a product like the [Gyeon Prep](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Prep-P1420/500-ml-S1/) before application. This product will help remove oils and provide you with a clean surface for your coating application. However, what if you can skip this step and apply a coating immediately after polishing? With Gyeon Primer, you can! Gyeon Primer is a finishing polish that will help you remove light imperfections in the paint, while leaving behind an SiO2 primer. This primer will allow you to apply a coating on top, without any wiping down necessary beforehand! This not only saves you valuable detailing time, but it helps avoid a detailing step that could possibly add imperfections into the paint. Just think of it this way, any time you touch the paint you are at risk at adding imperfections. High end products and techniques allow you to touch the paint with a greatly reduced risk of adding these imperfections, but if you can avoid one step where you have to touch the paint, it will only help reduce that risk even more. Gyeon recommends applying at a low to medium speed setting with the polisher of your choice. Once applied, wipe away any excess with a clean microfiber towel. When you are finished, you can apply a coating over the top after 24 hours. If you need to apply the coating immediately, they recommend using the Gyeon Prep to wipe the surface down first. If you are looking to remove light imperfections, while leaving your paint ready for coating application, the Gyeon Primer might be the product you are looking for!



For in-depth instructions on how to use Gyeon View check out the article [Gyeon Quartz Q2 Primer: What It Is and How to Use It](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-quartz-q2-primer-what-it-is-and-how-to-use-it/) by Jeff McEachran, the national brand manager at Gyeon USA.

### Professional Detailer Reviews

In short, Primer is a fine finishing polish that contains SiO2 in its composition. The goal being to lay down a base layer of SiO2 during your final polishing stage.

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2017/06/35594425735_d46a53265c_b-300x147.jpg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-quartz-q2-primer-what-it-is-and-how-to-use-it/)

- [Gyeon Quartz Q2 Primer: What It Is and How to Use It](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/gyeon-quartz-q2-primer-what-it-is-and-how-to-use-it/) by [Jeff McEachran](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/jeff-mceachran/)

### Videos

#### GYEON Polishing System

![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/AT2j3maT7lo/hqdefault.jpg)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Ultra light finish ans SiO2 primer. Superb surface preparation.

#### Directions

Work with a polishing machine of your choice. Spread the paste at low revs work until fully diminished at medium revs. Wipe off with a HQ microfiber. After 24 hours the residue evaporates and a SiO2 priming surface is ready to be coated without any other actions. Otherwise surface can be coated immediately after priming, but it requires Q2M Prep degreasing.

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Michael G. on 11/5/2018

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

This is a very nice polish to work with. It has a light cut to it and it leaves a layer of SiO2 behind to prime the surface for one's choice of Gyeon coatings. It leaves a very nice gloss to the finish and wipes off easily from the surface. The only downside is that one has to leave it for 24 hours if one does not want to do a prep wipe with something like Gyeon Prep. If one wants to coat sooner than that then Gyeon Prep would be the product to use and then proceed with a coating. 

It really helped extend the protection from Gyeon CanCoat as I was able to get 13 months out of the coating paired with Primer Polish. Would recommend this combo.

Reviewed by Glenn S. on 6/13/2024

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **No**

Didn't like it. Seemed to stick to my paint with difficult wipe off. Tried a few foam pads too. Just used my angel wax perfect finish.

[Read all customer reviews of Gyeon Primer](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Primer-P1476/Reviews/)
